title: Overarching Goals
html:
Christmas Day 2022 Yahir one-line goal: "Buy my mom a house by the river." Two months after the 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream note where the same goal appears + gets self-corrected to "mission and problem based" — this December restatement keeps the original framing.

yahir gonzalez · mom yahir · 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream · legacy question

related.label: Ahmad Jamal stream — late-2022 polymath dump (jazz, crypto, ChatGPT, CS 162)
